suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit non-interactive exec-mode guidance to `sdk-surface-worker` so the brainstorming step is satisfiable without a user-approval loop during Exec Mode validations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun review for `primary-generation-fix-responses-canonical-output-model` found the worker otherwise followed the expected surface-worker procedure (mission docs, TDD, verification) and only had to mark `followedProcedure=false` because the brainstorming step still assumes interactive approval in Exec Mode.
